zh.lifeSummary: Agnes Hurland於1521年出生在英國素福爾可斯托克 白 納易藍德。她於1535年與Thomas Morse在英國英格蘭素福爾可斯托克 白 納易藍德結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她去世於1574年4月5日在她的家鄉享年53歲，埋葬在英國素福爾可斯托克 白 納易藍德。

nameMeanings.name: Hurland
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Jewish Dov, Hyman, Yakov, Zelig.
Jewish (eastern Ashkenazic) and German: habitational name from Kurland, a region, now in Latvia, named for the Kurs, a Baltic people who once lived here.

variants.name: Kurlander
meanings: Jewish (eastern Ashkenazic): habitational name for someone from Kurland (see   Kurland  ).

nameMeanings.name: Agnes
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Latinized version of the Greek name Hagnē, from the feminine form of the adjective hagnos ‘pure, holy’. This was the name of a young Roman virgin martyred in the persecutions instigated by the Roman emperor Diocletian in ad 303 . She became a very popular saint in the Middle Ages. Her name was early associated with Latin agnus ‘lamb’, leading to the consistent dropping of the initial H- and to her representation in art accompanied by a lamb. The colloquial form Annes led to some confusion with Ann(e) in earlier centuries. Frequent in the medieval period, the name was revived in the 19th century, and has been especially popular in Scotland. See also Annis .

historicEvents.title: Book of Common Prayer
historicEvents.description: Book of Common Prayer, a product of the English Reformation, was published in 1549 for assistance in the administration of the sacraments and other rites and ceremonies of the church according to the use of the Church of England. The book outlined morning, evening, and communion prayers and orders for baptism and marriage, thus making England a truly Protestant state.

historicEvents.title: Act of Uniformity
historicEvents.description: The Act of Uniformity was passed by the Parliament of England and required all people to go to church once a week. The consequence of not attending church was a fine of 12 pence, which was a considerable amount for a poor person.

historicEvents.title: State Lottery
historicEvents.description: A State Lottery was recorded in 1569. The tickets were sold at St. Paul's Cathedral in London.

historicEvents.title: The Royal Exchange is Organized
historicEvents.description: The Royal Exchange was organized in January 1571 by Sir Thomas Gresham. Gresham is known as the father of English banking.

en.lifeSummary: Agnes Hurland was born in 1521, in Stoke by Nayland, Suffolk, England. She married Thomas Morse in 1535, in Stoke by Nayland, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 2 daughters. She died on 5 April 1574, in her hometown, at the age of 53, and was buried in Stoke by Nayland, Suffolk, England.

Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 2 filles. Elle est décédée le 5 avril 1574, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 53 ans, et a été enterrée à Stoke by Nayland, Suffolk, Angleterre.

Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Sie starb am 5. April 1574 im Alter von 53 Jahren in ihrem Geburtsort und wurde in Stoke by Nayland, Suffolk, England begraben.

ja.lifeSummary: Agnes Hurlandは1521年にイギリススフォルクストク ビー ナイランドで生まれた。1535年にイギリスイギリススフォルクストク ビー ナイランドでThomas Morseと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼女は1574年4月5日に故郷で53歳で死去し，イギリススフォルクストク ビー ナイランドにて埋葬された。

ko.Stoke By Nayland, Suffolk, England: 영국 잉글랜드 수폴크 스토크 비 나이랜드
ko.lifeSummary: Agnes Hurland(은)는 1521년 영국 수폴크 스토크 비 나이랜드에서 태어났다. 그녀는 1535년 영국 잉글랜드 수폴크 스토크 비 나이랜드에서 Thomas Morse(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1574년 4월 5일 그녀의 고향에서 53세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 수폴크 스토크 비 나이랜드에 묻혔다.

Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 2 filhas. Ela faleceu em 5 de abril de 1574, em sua cidade natal, com 53 anos, e foi sepultada em Stoke by Nayland, Suffolk, Inglaterra.

ru.Stoke By Nayland, Suffolk, England: сток би неиланд, суффолк, Англия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Agnes Hurland родилась в 1521 г. в местности сток би неиланд, суффолк, Англия. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Thomas Morse в 1535 г. в местности сток би неиланд, суффолк, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 2 дочери. Она умерла 5 апреля 1574 г. в её родном городе в возрасте 53 лет и была похоронена в местности сток би неиланд, суффолк, Англия.
